hero.headline: Keep Your Car Running Smoothly with Expert Auto Service in Dallas
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, our certified mechanics deliver quality workmanship you can trust.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: At P V Auto Services, we handle everything from oil changes to engine overhauls. Our state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment ensures we pinpoint issues quickly and accurately, saving you time and money.
bullets: Competitive pricing with no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: Ensure your safety with our thorough brake inspections and quality parts. We service all makes and models.

featureSections.title: Honest Advice, Quality Work
featureSections.body: We believe in clear communication and upfront pricing. Our team explains every repair in plain English, so you can make informed decisions about your vehicle.
featureSections.cardBody: We stand behind our work. If you're not happy, we'll make it right.

testimonials.quote: P V Auto Services saved me hundreds compared to the dealer. They diagnosed my check engine light in minutes and had me back on the road the same day. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: James R.

testimonials.quote: I've been bringing my SUV here for years. They always do a thorough job and explain everything clearly. Never felt pressured into unnecessary repairs.
testimonials.author: Maria G.

testimonials.quote: Honest mechanics are hard to find. P V Auto is the real deal. They fixed my transmission issue at a fair price and it's been running perfectly ever since.
testimonials.author: David L.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience Top-Notch Auto Service?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and see why Dallas drivers trust P V Auto Services.

servicesPage.intro: At P V Auto Services, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services to keep your vehicle running at its best. From routine oil changes to major engine repairs, our skilled technicians use the latest tools and techniques to deliver reliable results.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert repairs for all engine issues.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic equipment quickly identifies engine problems, from check engine lights to performance issues. We provide comprehensive repairs using quality parts to restore your engine's efficiency and power.

process.title: Thorough Inspection
process.description: We run a full diagnostic scan and inspect all engine components.

process.title: Detailed Explanation
process.description: Our technician explains the issue and provides a clear estimate.

process.title: Expert Repair
process.description: We complete the repair with precision and test drive to confirm.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics take about 30-60 minutes, depending on the complexity.

faqs.question: Do you service both gas and diesel engines?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work on all types of engines, including diesel and hybrid systems.

services.title: Brake Services
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement.
services.longDescription: Your safety depends on reliable brakes. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels to ensure optimal stopping power. Using premium parts, we restore your brake system to manufacturer standards.

process.title: Comprehensive Brake Check
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and fluid quality.

process.title: Transparent Recommendation
process.description: We show you what needs attention and explain your options.

process.title: Quality Installation
process.description: We replace worn parts with high-quality components and test the system.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits.

faqs.question: Do you offer brake pad warranties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we warranty our brake parts and labor for your peace of mind.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes and fluid checks.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the best way to extend your engine's life. We use quality oils and filters, and also check all other fluids — coolant, transmission, brake, and power steering — to keep your car running smoothly.
benefits: Preventative maintenance that catches issues early

process.title: Fluid Level Inspection
process.description: We check all fluid levels and top off as needed.

process.title: Oil & Filter Change
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and fill with fresh oil.

process.title: Multi-Point Check
process.description: We inspect belts, hoses, and other key components.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you recommend?
faqs.answer: We follow your manufacturer's recommendation, whether conventional, synthetic, or blend.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need an oil change every 5,000-7,500 miles.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with expert AC and heating service.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control systems, from refrigerant leaks to blower motor failures, ensuring you stay comfortable year-round.
benefits: Fast relief from AC or heating issues

process.title: System Diagnosis
process.description: We test pressures, temperatures, and electrical components.

process.title: Leak Detection & Repair
process.description: We find and fix refrigerant leaks using UV dye and electronic detectors.

process.title: Performance Test
process.description: We verify proper operation and charge the system to spec.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or an electrical issue. We'll diagnose the exact problem.

faqs.question: Do you repair heaters as well?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service both AC and heating systems, including heater cores and controls.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Auto Repair Experts
about.mission: Our mission is to provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our customers safe and satisfied. We believe in transparency, integrity, and craftsmanship.
story: P V Auto Services has been a staple in the Dallas community for over two decades. Founded by a team of passionate mechanics, our shop was built on the principle that every customer deserves fair treatment and expert workmanship. We started small, but word-of-mouth quickly spread, and today we're proud to serve thousands of loyal customers from across the city.

Our commitment to continuous learning and investment in the latest technology ensures we stay ahead of the curve. Whether it's a classic car or the newest model, our technicians have the skills and tools to handle it all. We treat every vehicle as if it were our own, and that dedication has earned us a reputation as one of Dallas's most reliable auto shops.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs — and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen, explain, and deliver.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a local business that gives back to Dallas.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with P V Auto Services
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule your appointment? Call us or fill out the form below, and we'll get back to you promptly.
